medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Median age 2 months, range 0-16.2 years; Occlusions of the left medial cerebral artery were predominant (n=24), one child developed thrombosis of the central retinal artery, and one thrombosis of the posterior cerebral artery.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Diagnostic measures included electroencephalography, cerebral sonograpy, computed tomography and/or magnetic resonance imaging of the cranium and echocardiography in all patients. Additional angiography was carried out in selected patients (n=5).
